Class GameService

java.lang.Object
com.splendor.web.game.GameService
@Service public class GameService extends Object
Web game façade: delegates to setup, token rules, card rules, turn flow, CPU, and outcome services so controllers depend on one bean while logic stays split by responsibility.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GameService(WebGameSetupService setup, WebTokenRulesService tokenRules, WebCardRulesService cardRules, TurnPhaseService turnPhase, CpuTurnService cpuTurn, GameOutcomeService outcomes)
    Wires the façade to all specialized game services.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameService

      public GameService(WebGameSetupService setup, WebTokenRulesService tokenRules, WebCardRulesService cardRules, TurnPhaseService turnPhase, CpuTurnService cpuTurn, GameOutcomeService outcomes)
      Wires the façade to all specialized game services.
      Parameters:
      setup - new-game construction
      tokenRules - take/return gem rules
      cardRules - reserve and purchase rules
      turnPhase - end-of-turn nobles and game-end checks
      cpuTurn - CPU play-by-play execution
      outcomes - winner calculation

  • Method Details

    • newGame

      public GameSession newGame(List<PlayerSetup> playersInTurnOrder)
      Parameters:
      playersInTurnOrder - seats in turn order (youngest first)
      Returns:
      new session with board initialized

    • take3Tokens

      public boolean take3Tokens(GameSession session, List<String> colors)
      Parameters:
      session - current game
      colors - three distinct valid gem colours with bank availability
      Returns:
      true if the take was applied

    • take2Tokens

      public boolean take2Tokens(GameSession session, String color)
      Parameters:
      session - current game
      color - gem colour with at least four tokens in the bank
      Returns:
      true if two tokens were taken

    • reserveCardFromTable

      public boolean reserveCardFromTable(GameSession session, int level, int index)
      Parameters:
      session - current game
      level - card level (1–3)
      index - index in the open row
      Returns:
      true if reserved (and gold given if available)

    • reserveCardFromDeck

      public boolean reserveCardFromDeck(GameSession session, int level)
      Parameters:
      session - current game
      level - deck level (1–3)
      Returns:
      true if a card was drawn from the top of the closed deck into reserves

    • buyCardFromTable

      public boolean buyCardFromTable(GameSession session, int level, int index)
      Parameters:
      session - current game
      level - card level
      index - index in the open row
      Returns:
      true if the purchase succeeded

    • buyReservedCard

      public boolean buyReservedCard(GameSession session, int reservedIndex)
      Parameters:
      session - current game
      reservedIndex - index in the current player's reserved list
      Returns:
      true if the purchase succeeded

    • executeReturnTokens

      public void executeReturnTokens(GameSession session, List<String> tokensToReturn)
      Parameters:
      session - current game
      tokensToReturn - gem colours to return from the current player to the bank

    • finishTurn

      public Noble finishTurn(GameSession session)
      Parameters:
      session - current game
      Returns:
      noble acquired this turn, if any

    • computeWinnerPlayerIds

      public List<Integer> computeWinnerPlayerIds(GameSession gs)
      Parameters:
      gs - finished game state
      Returns:
      winning player id(s) after tie-break

    • executeOneCPUTurn

      public List<String> executeOneCPUTurn(GameSession gs)
      Runs exactly one CPU turn (mutates gs) and returns log lines for the UI.
      Parameters:
      gs - current game; current player must be CPU
      Returns:
      human-readable steps for cpu-turn view
